title: Grow Garden
description:
GrowGarden is a Minecraft plugin inspired by the popular Roblox game Grow a Garden.
Players can plant, water, grow, and harvest crops to earn coins and upgrade their garden.
body:
GardenGrow is a Minecraft plugin based on the popular Roblox game Grow a Garden. Players can grow, water, plant, and harvest crops to earn coins and cultivate their garden. Weather events like thunderstorms and rain can enhance crops and give them special effects such as Watered, Golden, or Thundered types.

Features:

-Planting & harvesting system

-Growth cooldown before crops can be harvested

-Random weather events that affect crops

-Coin system & shop GUI

-Right-click crops to view their status

-Single NPC or block click to view menus

Feel free to utilize this plugin on your server or in a video, but do make sure to properly credit by having a shoutout towards me as the creator of this plugin

BTW, join my discord server to make me futher updates on gag plugin!
